name: kaola-workflow-gitlab
description: GitLab edition of Kaola-Workflow for Codex, an adaptive, resumable DAG of role nodes using GitLab issues, merge requests, glab, and repo-backed workflow artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Adaptive DAG-of-roles Kaola-Workflow for GitLab projects
interface.longDescription: Kaola-Workflow GitLab for Codex exposes repo-backed skills and Codex-native agent profiles for project initialization, workflow-init, and adaptive, resumable execution: a planner authors and freezes a task-shaped DAG of role nodes in workflow-plan.md, then the executor runs it node-by-node via the running-set scheduler through research, planning, TDD execution, review, documentation docking, and finalization against GitLab issues and merge requests.
defaultPrompt: Use Kaola-Workflow GitLab for Codex in this repo.
Resume the current Kaola-Workflow GitLab project.
Run workflow-init for Kaola-Workflow GitLab for Codex.
